source_method: Exact-name Scryfall API lookups using /cards/named?exact=<card name> with JSON responses from api.scryfall.com.
candidate_intake_provenance: Stable intake manifest for candidate:scryfall references. An ID remains in this manifest after its facts record is promoted to cards.json, preserving only known candidate history.
boundary_statement: These records are Card Facts only. No recommendations are created, no deck changes are authorized, and future recommendation candidates may reference these facts only after validator support exists.
notes: This intake layer is separate from workshop/card-data/cards.json.
The existing 106-card deck Card Facts layer was not modified.
Candidate facts are facts_only and are not deck recommendations.
